name: Acid Splash
summary: Ranged touch attack: 1d3 acid damage.

name: Light
summary: Object glows like a torch for 10 min/CL.

name: Stabilize
summary: Stabilizes a dying creature (negative HP).

name: Magic Missile
summary: 1 missile (+1 per 2 CL above 1, max 5); each does 1d4+1 force damage.

name: Burning Hands
summary: 1d4 fire/CL (max 5d4) in a 15-ft cone, Reflex half.

name: Cure Light Wounds
summary: Cures 1d8 + 1/CL (max +5) HP.

name: Bless
summary: +1 morale to attack and saves vs fear for allies in 50 ft, 1 min/CL.

name: Mage Armor
summary: +4 armor bonus to AC for 1 hour/CL.

name: Sleep
summary: Puts up to 4 HD of creatures to sleep; Will negates.

name: Charm Person
summary: One humanoid becomes friendly; Will negates.

name: Dispel Magic
summary: Caster level check (1d20 + CL) vs DC 11 + target effect's CL to remove one ongoing spell effect.

name: Fireball
summary: 1d6 fire/CL (max 10d6) in a 20-ft-radius spread; Reflex half.

name: Lightning Bolt
summary: 1d6 electricity/CL (max 10d6) in a 120-ft line; Reflex half.

name: Shocking Grasp
summary: 1d6 electricity/CL (max 5d6) on touch; +3 attack vs metal-armor wearers (not modeled).

name: Scorching Ray
summary: 1 ray at CL 3, +1 ray at CL 7 and 11. Each ray: 4d6 fire on a successful ranged touch attack.

name: Cone of Cold
summary: 1d6 cold/CL (max 15d6) in a 60-ft cone; Reflex half.

name: Silent Image
summary: Visual figment; viewers may attempt Will save to disbelieve, with a +4 bonus on interaction.

name: Bless (Emanation Variant)
summary: Allies within 50 ft of the caster get +1 morale to attack and saves vs fear.

name: Acid Arrow
summary: 2d4 acid on ranged touch. Lingering damage per round (not modeled).

name: Silence
summary: Target creature is silenced (no V-component spells, can't speak) for 1 min/level. Will negates.

name: Color Spray
summary: Cone of vivid color. Will negates. Failed save: ≤2 HD = unconscious + blind + stunned; 3-5 HD = blind + stunned; 6+ HD = stunned.

name: Cause Fear
summary: Target with ≤5 HD must Will save. Failed save: frightened 1d4 rounds. Successful save: shaken 1 round.

name: Shield
summary: +4 shield bonus to AC. Negates magic missile.

name: Divine Favor
summary: +1 luck to attack and damage rolls (scales 1/3 caster levels, capped at +3) for 1 min.

name: Shield of Faith
summary: +2 deflection to AC (+1 per 6 caster levels, max +5).

name: Magic Weapon
summary: +1 enhancement to attack and damage with one weapon.

name: Protection from Evil
summary: +2 deflection AC and +2 resistance saves vs evil creatures (we apply unconditionally for v1). Plus mind-control protection.

name: True Strike
summary: +20 insight bonus to your next attack roll within 1 round.

name: Enlarge Person
summary: Increase target one size category. +2 Str, -2 Dex, -1 size AC, -1 attack.

name: Ray of Enfeeblement
summary: Ranged touch attack imposing -1d6+1/2 caster level Strength penalty (max -5 + half level). Save halves the penalty.

name: Grease
summary: Greasy area causes creatures to fall prone (Reflex negates). Items greased grant +10 to opposed disarm/steal.

name: Command
summary: Single command word obeyed for 1 round (approximated as dazed for v1).

name: Doom
summary: Target is shaken for 1 min/level. Will negates.

name: Sanctuary
summary: Opponents must Will save (DC = sanctuary's DC) to attack target; failure = can't attack target this turn.

name: Cure Moderate Wounds
summary: Heals 2d8 + 1/level (max +10).

name: Cure Serious Wounds
summary: Heals 3d8 + 1/level (max +15).

name: Cure Critical Wounds
summary: Heals 4d8 + 1/level (max +20).

name: Bull's Strength
summary: +4 enhancement to Strength for 1 min/level.

name: Cat's Grace
summary: +4 enhancement to Dexterity for 1 min/level.

name: Bear's Endurance
summary: +4 enhancement to Constitution for 1 min/level.

name: Eagle's Splendor
summary: +4 enhancement to Charisma for 1 min/level.

name: Fox's Cunning
summary: +4 enhancement to Intelligence for 1 min/level.

name: Owl's Wisdom
summary: +4 enhancement to Wisdom for 1 min/level.

name: Hold Person
summary: Paralyzes one humanoid for 1 round/level. Will negates; new save each round.

name: Hideous Laughter
summary: Target laughs uncontrollably (helpless). Will negates.

name: Daze
summary: Target with 4 HD or fewer is dazed for 1 round. Will negates.

name: Fear
summary: Cone of fear. Failed save: panicked 1 round/level. Save: shaken 1 round.

name: Scare
summary: Targets with 5 HD or fewer become frightened on failed Will save (shaken on success).

name: Deep Slumber
summary: Like sleep but affects up to 10 HD of creatures.

name: Stinking Cloud
summary: 20-ft spread of nauseating gas. Fortitude negates each round.

name: Web
summary: 20-ft web fills the area. Reflex negates entanglement.

name: Glitterdust
summary: Glittering dust outlines invisible creatures and blinds those who fail Will.

name: Sound Burst
summary: 1d8 sonic damage in a 10-ft burst; Fort save or stunned 1 round (stun not modeled).

name: Haste
summary: Allies gain +1 attack, +1 dodge AC, +1 Reflex save, and one extra attack per full attack.

name: Slow
summary: Targets are staggered (one move OR standard, not both); -1 attack/AC/save (proxy via staggered).

name: Prayer
summary: Allies +1 luck to attack/damage/saves; enemies -1. (We model the ally side only for v1.)

name: Searing Light
summary: 1d8 per 2 caster levels (max 5d8) on ranged touch. Bonus damage vs undead.

name: Spiritual Weapon
summary: Force weapon attacks each round for 1 round/level.

name: Lesser Restoration
summary: Heals 1d4 ability damage from one stat OR removes fatigue. (Modeled as utility for v1.)

name: Remove Paralysis
summary: Removes paralysis from one creature, or partial duration from many. (Modeled as utility for v1.)

name: Mass Cure Light Wounds
summary: Heal 1d8 + 1/level (max +25) for each ally in 30-ft burst.

name: Flame Strike
summary: 1d6 fire/level (max 15d6); half damage is divine and bypasses fire resistance.

name: Ice Storm
summary: 3d6 bludgeoning + 2d6 cold (modeled as 5d6 cold for v1) in a 20-ft cylinder.

name: Vampiric Touch
summary: 1d6 per 2 caster levels (max 10d6); damage dealt heals the caster (heal not modeled).

name: Chain Lightning
summary: 1d6 electricity/level (max 20d6) primary; secondary chains at half damage.

name: Ray of Frost
summary: Ranged touch attack: 1d3 cold damage.

name: Disrupt Undead
summary: Ranged touch attack vs undead: 1d6 positive energy.

name: Flare
summary: Burst of light. Fort save or dazzled for 1 minute.

name: Touch of Fatigue
summary: Melee touch. Fort save or fatigued for 1 round/level.

name: Bleed
summary: Cause a stable dying creature to start bleeding 1 HP/round again.

name: Resistance
summary: +1 resistance to all saves for 1 minute.

name: Virtue
summary: +1 temporary HP for 1 minute.

name: Guidance
summary: +1 competence on a single attack/save/skill check; discharged on first qualifying d20 roll or expires in 1 minute.
